records.subcategory: Notes: 1. The above options provide only a small sample of the myriad of possibilities. They provide a cross section of average labor times required for plaster and gypsum board assemblies. 2. A multiplier of 1.5 was used to convert civilian production rates to military production rates in this figure. No further adjustment required for military production. 3. Refer to Division 09 29 10.30 for gypsum board installation.

records.subcategory: Notes: 1. Surface preparation for exterior painting includes removing mill scale from metal surfaces with wire brushes or by sandblasting, removing dust with brush or cloth, removing oil and grease, masking and taping adjacent surfaces, and removing masking and taping. Sometimes it is necessary to lightly sand between coats, or size and fill porous materiels before painting, all of which is surface preparation. 2. Fence metal painting includes removing rust, scale, oil, grease, and dirt; and mixing and applying paint. 3. Labor for erection of scaffolding not included. Refer to Division 01 54 23.70 for scaffolding. 4. Refer to Division 09 97 13.23 for painting metals. 5. For work over 12 feet high, from pipe scaffolding, multiply by 1.15. 6. For work over 12 feet high, from extension ladder, multiply by 1.25. 7. For work over 12 feet high, from swing staging
records.activityName: Notes: 1. Surface preparation for exterior painting includes removing mill scale from metal surfaces with wire brushes or by sandblasting, removing dust with brush or cloth, removing oil and grease, masking and taping adjacent surfaces, and removing masking and taping. Sometimes it is necessary to lightly sand between coats, or size and fill porous materiels before painting, all of which is surface preparation. 2. Fence metal painting includes removing rust, scale, oil, grease, and dirt; and mixing and applying paint. 3. Labor for erection of scaffolding not included. Refer to Division 01 54 23.70 for scaffolding. 4. Refer to Division 09 97 13.23 for painting metals. 5. For work over 12 feet high, from pipe scaffolding, multiply by 1.15. 6. For work over 12 feet high, from extension ladder, multiply by 1.25. 7. For work over 12 feet high, from swing staging, multiply by 1.35.
